use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, dialogs, and calls-to-action across any web application
Navigation and routing triggers with consistent styling throughout an application
Destructive actions like delete or cancel operations using the destructive variant
Secondary or tertiary actions using outline, secondary, and ghost variants for visual hierarchy
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces like toolbars or navigation bars
ai_summary: A versatile, Radix UI-based button component with CVA-powered variant system offering 6 visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Supports composition via asChild prop and includes accessibility-ready focus states with ring outlines. Built with Tailwind shadow utilities and standard transition animations for hover and active states.
